title: Softly Steamed Syrian Mung-Bean-Sprout-Sukju Mushimono
description: A delicate and savory umami dish perfect for post-workout recovery, featuring mung-bean-sprouts, sukju, and an iron teppan vessel.
instructions: Heat the iron teppan to low-medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of olive oil and let it heat up for 1 minute.
Add the mung-bean sprouts and sukju, and stir occasionally for 2 minutes.
Pour in 1 cup of water and cover the teppan with a lid.
Steam the mixture for 10 minutes, or until the mung-bean sprouts are tender and pillowy.
Serve immediately, garnished with sesame seeds if desired.
Transfer the teppan to a wire rack to cool slightly before serving.
